title: Your cramp days are increasing
body: Period pain that gets worse cycle over cycle is worth mentioning to a doctor. It can have several treatable causes.

title: You have been logging heavy flow
body: Consistently heavy periods are worth discussing with a doctor — especially if you are soaking through a pad or tampon within an hour, on multiple consecutive hours, or feeling unusually fatigued.

title: Cramps outside your period
body: Cramps outside your period can have several causes. It's worth mentioning to a doctor who can help investigate.

title: A pattern worth discussing with your doctor
body: You've been logging significant mood symptoms in the days before your period across several cycles. If this pattern significantly affects your daily life, your doctor can help — there are recognised approaches that can make a real difference. The IAPMD has specialist support.

title: Severe symptoms most cycles
body: You are consistently logging multiple high-intensity symptoms. This pattern is worth discussing with a doctor — there are well-understood and treatable causes.
